resources.string: An account already exists with this email
Already have an account? Log in
Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each period; manage your subscription through your Store account.
This word is incorrect? Report error
Cannot open epub it needs storage access !
Click back again to exit the app
Tap on QR code to enlarge
Tap here if you want to quit
It seems the time in your phone is not correct as current time. Please set it correctly!
"Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above."
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
You\u0009re in control - choose what info you want to share with apps.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\u0009 run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
%1$s won\u0009 run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
All data will be cleared (saved words, account PRO…), you can not restore it.

4English divides the memory levels into 6 levels, from level 1 to Deep memory. To improve your memory levels, you need to relearn and remember the word after each interval as shown in the table below. Don\u0009 worry, 4English will remind you when it\u0009s time to relearn.

"The basis for spaced repetition research was laid by Hermann Ebbinghaus, who suggested that information loss over time follows a forgetting curve, but that forgetting could be reset with repetition based on active recall. Spaced repetition is a method where the subject is asked to remember a certain fact with the time intervals increasing each time the fact is presented or said. If the subject is able to recall the information correctly the time is doubled to further help them keep the information fresh in their mind to recall in the future(*)"
Improve reading comprehension with high-quality translations
Discover a library of classic foreign literature
Expand your vocabulary through daily news
This word will not appear in your list of reviewed words.
Listen & choose a correct word to fill into the blank
If you find this app is useful, could you please take a few seconds to share it with your friends?
This app needs permission to use this feature. You can grant them in app settings.
Do not connect to `%s`, please check it
Download to see all of the vocabulary

"- Can press and hold to move the translation screen.
- Content in the Bilingual section is translated by a translator.
- Other parts are translated by Google."

"- Drag the title bar to move this box up or down.
- Translated by Google Translate."
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
You cannot use this avatar, please try another one
You have failed to connect the game room.
You cannot use this name, please try another one
You haven’t joined the game room yet.
Please update app to the latest version to play game.
This word is not in the dictionary.
You do not follow the game rules.
Enter a word that starts with the last letter of the previous word.
Only the fastest response will be counted.
You have to sign in to use this feature!
Listen and type what you hear!
You can set ways to learn here
You need to rewrite the word once, next time the word will be hidden
Complete grammar from basic to advanced
You will need to review %1$d words
I agree to Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Enter email and password to log in
Boost your English skills with an unlimited learning experience.
Android SQLite API based on SQLCipher
Build natural reflexes & develop rich vocabulary.
Looks like this app doesn\u0009 have location services configured. Please see OneSignal docs for more information.
"You haven't received any rewards yet. Test your luck at the beginning of the year and win great prizes."
"• Each user will have 1 free spin • Additionally, you will receive more spin tickets by completing the following learning tasks:"
" • Take a screenshot of the reward you received • Contact the fanpage 4English - Super English learning app to receive gifts"

"• 50% off voucher for 4English PRO upgrade, plus a 1-month PRO package for the 4You app • Lucky money of 200,000 VNĐ • Tet gift set • Exclusive English learning materials • Secret physical gift • New Year's message"
"• Each prize is limited in quantity • All final decisions belong to the 4English organizing committee"
WISH FOR GOOD LUCK IN EXAMS
Ran out of tickets, you need to hunt for tickets now!
"Ran out of tickets, please wait to join tomorrow"
"Congratulations on receiving an additional 1 ticket!"
Enter the code for 50% off 4English PRO upgrade
"Eat without worrying about getting fat, learn without worrying about forgetting Exams are smooth, pass every exam"
"Play for fun, sleep for money Everything is like a fairy, money fills your wallet"
"A hug for you Because you worked hard last year"
"Congratulations on receiving the exclusive English document from 4English"

" Congratulations on winning %s
Contact 4English to claim your prize! "
WIN A SECRET GIFT TO START THE YEAR
"Comes with a 1-month PRO package 4You - Learn English through videos"
"Eat without worrying about gaining weight, study without forgetting May your exams be smooth, pass wherever you take them"
"Play for fun, sleep for money May everything go smoothly, may your wallet be full"

" Sending you a hug
For your hard work this past year "
To download the news & podcasts, you need upgrade to the PRO version.
"To read books & use 'Tap to translate' feature, you need to upgrade to the PRO version."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.

"Step 1. Read news or watch video Step 2. Click the word to search definition Step 3. Save the searched word
*Save 3 or more new words"
Go to Vocab packs, search and download the one that you want to learn
Learn current vocabulary to reach Level 1
Do it everyday, spend at least 10 minutes to learn new words and review old ones.
Yes, move back to Level 1 and remind me to review
PRO status will be applied to your current account in the app
The ad is about to appear helps us develop this app & keep it FREE. To remove ads, you can buy the PRO version.
After saving you can edit the vocabulary information as you want
If you want to remove ads, upgrade to PRO
You can always change this later in settings.
Message the fanpage for instructions on adding new dictionaries
This information is used to suggest content suitable to your goal
This information is used to suggest content suitable to your level
This information is used to suggest suitable dictionaries for you
Follow at least 1 topics you are interested in.
Are you sure to remove this book from list?
Are you sure to delete this news?
Are you sure your entered email is correct?
Are you sure want to leave?
Do you want to review this word more?
You have answered incorrectly or needed to use hints for this word several times, do you want to review more?
These words will not appear in your list of reviewed words.
Are you sure you want to use this code?
You want to create an empty vocab pack?
Are you sure to delete all?
Yearly subscription automatically renews each year, quarterly subscription automatically renews every 3 months. Cancel anytime in Subscriptions on Play store
Your PRO version is going to expire on %s. Would you like to buy more days?
Your PRO version has already expired. Would you like to buy more days?
- You can open settings to add many other dictionaries
- You can change the order of your dictionaries
This function redirects you to websites of quality dictionaries. Their data sources do not belong to 4English
To learn this vocabulary pack, you need to download it first
To download more Vocabulary Pack you need upgrade to the PRO version.
You haven\u0009 saved any words. Save words while you learn to review them later here.

"You haven\u0009 saved any words yet. Let\u0009 save the words to review when you study.
You can also download vocabulary packs here:"
"You haven't downloaded any vocabulary pack yet."
Your device does not support TTS. Please use the Podcast feature to practice listening
Your PRO account has already expired!
Export all vocabularies in folder \"%s\" to excel
Write to us if you want to change anything in this game
The feature not available on Android 11, please wait for the update to use it. Thank you!

"You can find and open ebooks in the EPUB format on your device. Only EPUB files are supported now. To read other files (pdf, docx...) you can enable Quick dictionary on Dictionary screen to use the dictionary outside 4English app"
"If you can't watch video, follow the steps below:"
"Vocab pack doesn 't exist. Check it again"
Unsupported API on this version. Please go to Store to update to the newest version!
You still have %d free learning sessions!
This function is similar to a web browser, where you can tap a word to translate instantly
You can tap on a word to get its meaning and save it to review later
You can long press on a word to translate selected phrase.
Your searched words will appear here
Image size is too large (maximum limit: 2MB)
Enter ID of vocab pack that your friends have shared so you can also learn it
Start learning to remember words in your vocab
Meanwhile you can learn new words
Your account log out automatically because it is not allowed for more than %d devices to log in one account. Below is a list of devices:
Please wait 30s for the data to be updated!
There is another device that has started learning. You will not be able to continue using it.
Complete the previous exercise to unlock this!
Send us name or website of dictionaries that you would like to have
Send us name or FaceBook of author that you would like to have
You are not logged in, please login again to use PRO account!
No exercise. Please choose other exercise type!
"You may forget learned words unless turning on 4English's remind notifications"
After successfully purchasing, log out and log back in if your account status hasn\u0009 been updated
Errors may occur when you use SwiftKey, please choose another keyboard to continue!
"*You are turning off 4English 's notifications, so you can 't receive reminders to learn. Click here to turn on"
"You already own this package, you can't buy it again"
You need allow permission to open Quick Dictionary
This function needs to access your Google account (via Contacts).
Please grant permission to record audio.
"Can't play this audio. Please try another!"
To read news in the Bilingual section, you need to upgrade to PRO
To do more exercises, please upgrade to PRO version
You need to upgrade to PRO to create new folder
To play, you need upgrade to the PRO version.
To view the full grammar document, you need to upgrade to the PRO version
To save words with image, you need upgrade to the PRO version.
Your in-app account has been updated to PRO
Sorry, something went wrong. Please get in touch with us
Your daily goal is waiting for you!
Is this definition of the word above?
Is this example of the word above?
*All recordings will be deleted when you leave this screen
Report the subtitles of this video have typos or can not play.
Report that can not read this website
Please close 4English and reopen it to complete the update process. Thank you!
You need to complete the previous levels
Show full dictionary whenever you tap on words
Hide/show, sort your dictionaries by priority
Send this ID to your friends so they can also learn this vocab pack
Go to 4English and play with me!
4English will suggest new words for you based on your reading list, study goals and topics you follow.
Tap to get guide throughout the app
You can click on a word to get its meaning.
You can long press on a word to translate selected phrase.
"Step 1: Listen to the model example Step 2: Press record and speak Step 3: Listen to your recordings Step 4: Repeat"
Tips: Enable Text to speech on Setting
Tips: You can click on a word to translate after this website has been loaded completely!
To continue use this feature, please upgrade to the PRO version.
To download this dictionary you need upgrade to the PRO version.
The text will be spoken by the machine(not by the human). If you prefer human, please use tab Listening to practice listening.
This is a machine voice, it will not sound accurate. If you want to hear the correct voice, please use the lessons in the Listening section.
Meanwhile, you can relearn these words or learn new words in other vocab packs
"The book can’t be read because its name is too long or contains strange characters. Try a simpler name. For example: bookname.epub"
"4English does not recommend learning new words when you have words to review. You should review the words that are reminded to ensure quality."
If you relearn now, your result won\u0009be recorded.
Well done, keep it up with good work!
"Please Open Youtube and try again Check if Youtube app has a new version on PlayStore"
You need to sign in to your YouTube account to get the subscribed channels
Start date selection: %1$s \u0009 End date selection: %2$s
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Your device not support change speed
*Images below are just suggestions. You can upload your own photo if necessary
View the ad you saved when you were offline
"You 'll get a notification with the link when you 're back online"
"We'll send you a notification with a link to the advertiser site."
Password must be at least 6 characters
You have previously denied %s. Please go to settings to enable.
Practice listening and reading anytime, anywhere
Everyday practice is the key to success in learning a language
Take 5 minutes to read news articles, watch videos, or listen to podcasts in English.
Take the time to read an English article
"Let's watch a video to learn English"
"Everyday practice is the key to learn English well! Let's do a small exercise now!"
Keep practicing your English with a brief lesson
How about listening to podcasts to learn English?
"Learning English requires regular practice. Let's practice your English now"
"Let's take a break and learn English!"
"If you enjoy using this App, please take a moment to rate it. Thanks for your support!"
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions.
This app may not work correctly without the requested permissions. Open the app settings screen to modify app permissions.
Understand new words with just one tap. Save words in context for deeper learning.
Tap to look up words instantly!
Yes, step back 1 level and remind me to review
App needs the External Storage permission for searching books.
App needs the External Storage permission for saving file.
Congratulations! Your password has been updated successfully. Please tap continue to log in.
%1$s is banned. First to %2$d points wins!
All words must end with %1$s. First to %2$d points wins!
Get to %1$d points first without ending words with \"%2$s\"
Less time per turn. First to %1$d points wins
Character limit: %1$d. First to %2$d points wins.
No words under %1$d letters. First to %2$d points wins!
No words under %1$d letters and ending with \"%2$s\"
First player to get to %1$d points wins
All words must start with \"%1$s\". First to %2$d points wins.
Step 1: Press Settings go to Youtube Settings
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Step 3: Clear Storage usage of Youtube (data, cache)
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
When you move to new cards
Information that is off will be displayed on the reverse side.
Information displayed on the same side with the words
Numbers of questions for learned words
You need to sign in to follow.
You need to sign in to purchases.
You need to sign in to save favorites.
You need to sign in to save words!
You need to sign in to use this function!
You need to sign in to view data!
We offer 30 dictionaries (and still updating) for any purpose, for English learners everywhere!
All different resources suitable to your preference. Improve your reading and listening skills while enjoying content.
Study Less - Remember More new words with scientific method - Spaced Repetition.
Play vocabulary games and compete with your friends!
" <u style=\" border-bottom: 1px dashed #bcbcbc; text-decoration: none; \"> Style </u> "
"- You only need to enter words, 4English will automatically get the definition, examples and images for you. - Break the line to separate words. - Maximum of 100 words"
look up words and translates sentences on any website
Selected & translated by the translation team
Reading 1000+ books available. Touch the words to get its meaning.
Upload file to read. Touch the words to get its meaning.
Setting ways to learn new words, not yet level 1
Setting ways to learn reviewed words, words with level 1 and above
Learning vocabulary with funny word chain game
Listen to selected international news articles
Connect YouTube to practice listening to your favorite videos
Updating everyday. Touch the words to get its meaning.
This information is used to recommend suitable content for you
Practice reading for understanding social media posts
Suggest new words from this pack first

Are you sure to delete this word?

Saving the word with definition, example and image will help you review it easier with flashcards and quizzes.
Auto pronounce when looking up words
Surf the net to learn English
Are you sure you want to delete this account?
"To use app effectively, let's complete these tasks"
This word is considered Memory Level 1
Select learning resources that you like
Study Less - Remember More new words with scientific method - Spaced Repetition ICON
Click here to see highlight words
Any text you copy will be automatically translated here
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
Understand over 3000 vocabulary words in context.
Unlimited translate, search and vocab highlight features.
Words must be %1$d letters or longer.
"Your vocabulary is empty. Read the news to save new words!"
Please watch a whole short video to get %1$d free times use this feature.
"You're run out of the free times to use highlight feature. Please watch a whole short video to get %d free times using that feature."
"Please watch a whole short video to continue use this feature free. The ad about to appear helps us develop this app & keep it FREE."
4English Vocab Widget – shows your daily vocabulary word
